ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_type" TEXT /* Type of manufacturer (e.g., 'Domestic', 'International') */,
  "manufacturer_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer was established */,
  "manufacturer_headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "manufacturer_regulatory_compliance_status" TEXT /* Regulatory compliance status of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_products" TEXT /* List of products manufactured by the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recall associated with the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., 'Planned', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "action_initiation_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was initiated */,
  "action_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was completed */,
  "action_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the action */,
  "action_impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the action */,
  "action_responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the action */,
  "action_responsible_email" TEXT /* Email of the person responsible for the action */,
  "action_responsible_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the person responsible for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recall associated with the impact */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., 'Public Health', 'Financial', 'Reputation', 'Regulatory') */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the impact (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High') */,
  "impact_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was assessed */,
  "impact_mitigation_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to mitigate the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recall associated with the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., 'Email', 'Letter', 'Phone Call') */,
  "communication_content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "communication_recipients" TEXT /* List of recipients of the communication */,
  "communication_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., 'Sent', 'Delivered', 'Read') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recall associated with the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., 'Internal', 'External') */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., 'Passed', 'Failed') */,
  "audit_findings" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "audit_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations from the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
